name: EBA-Q-and-A-binding-guidance
description: European Banking Authority publicerar Q&A med bindande tolkning av CRR3 (Capital Requirements Regulation 3). Binding Q&A från ESA räknas som guidance enligt EU:s rättskällehierarki — inte regulation. EU jurisdiction.

afterHtml:
European Banking Authority · Single Rulebook Q&A

Published Q&As

The Single Rulebook Q&A tool allows credit institutions, investment firms and supervisory authorities to submit and consult questions on the practical application of Single Rulebook provisions.

New binding Q&A (2026-04-15): Ref. 2026_7502 — CRR 3

Q: How should institutions treat operational risk capital requirements for crypto-asset custody services under the revised CRR 3 framework?

A: Institutions providing crypto-asset custody services must apply the standardised approach under Article 312 CRR 3 with the alpha adjustment factor specified in Article 317a. The business indicator must include fees and commissions earned from custody, staking, and settlement services. This answer reflects the joint view of the EBA Q&A team and is binding on competent authorities under Article 29 of EBA's founding regulation.
